methods.name: register
methods.desc: Register a stealth meta-address (spending pub 64B + viewing pub 64B = 128B).

methods.name: announce
methods.desc:
Publish a stealth payment announcement.
Data: ephemeral_pub (64B) + stealth_addr (32B) + view_tag (1B) + metadata

methods.name: deregister
methods.desc: Remove a meta-address registration. Reclaims box MBR.
